feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: A Little Sunshine
entry.summary:
Author: LuminescentWoollyBear

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,434Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 23

Summary: An alien appears in Metropolis and Bruce doesn't know what to do about it. Even more concerning, Bruce breaks his promise to himself to avoid unnecessary attachments and starts developing feelings for his new friend, Clark. But he just can't help gravitating towards the earnest kindness and protective warmth of the other. If he isn't careful, Bruce might even start trusting him.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Behind Our Masks
entry.summary:
Author: WriteMeLikeDia

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 123,871Chapters: 16/20Kudos: 36

Summary: Clark Kent is sent to Gotham, tasked with uncovering Bruce Wayne's secret identity as Batman. At first, the banter and tease doesn't take them far, until the two eventually fall into a very complicated relationship. Will he manage to uncover his boss' secret identity before falling in love? Who's mask will fall first?—————By their third shots, Clark feels bold enough to ask, “What about you? Any romantic history?” Bruce doesn’t hesitate to answer with a straight, “No.” “No as in… nothing?” “Never been with a woman,” Bruce says, then adds, “or a man.” Or a man. Clark tries to play a neutral reaction, yet his voice can’t help but come out a little too intrigued as he whispers, “Oh.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: From Gotham with Love
entry.summary:
Author: anxiousdepressedintrovert

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 67,329Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 116

Summary: Martha and Thomas Wayne are Gotham’s golden couple—wealthy, admired, and untouchable. Their daughter, Beatrice, is the heart of their legacy. But one night shatters everything. The Waynes are murdered in cold blood, and young Beatrice vanishes without a trace. Two years later, she returns. Alive—but not the same. Now, Gotham must face the mystery of the girl who came back... and the shadows that followed her home.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The beat of your heart (And the beat of my wings)
entry.summary:
Author: Hubcap_Stealer_YumYum

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,831Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 80

Summary: Who knows? Maybe he’d even earn brownie points with the Batman for being able to take care of his precious city quickly.·˖✶𓆩🦇𓆪✶˖·˳.He wanted the Alien out of his city and he wanted him out NOW. Bruce Wayne, also known as the batman, watched over his city from above and violently repelled any intruders. That is, until a man with a blinding smile who can fly just as high as he can shows up, and a little boy who watched his parents die shortly after. TLDR: Bruce has bat wings and they attract the empathetic Kal'El, who helps him be a better person and father. This will go through the entire bat family until we catch 'em all

entry.title: Wanting You
entry.summary:
Author: shinnie_marie

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,178Chapters: 5/10Kudos: 4

Summary: The whole city encountered a much worse villain, it's not because he will conquer the whole world, it was because he only targets the one and only savior in their town. Superman However, Superman somehow got weakened after the battles between the creature called Grongus. And guess what, that creature holds his greatest weakness—the kryptonite. And the only one who can save everyone and even him is Batman. Superman thought Batman despises him after what happened seven years ago. Until, Superman accidentally read his mind. “It feels good on top of him.” Superman suddenly freaks out upon hearing what he shouldn't have heard. Batman agreed to find out who made the creatures and why they are targeting Superman. Meanwhile, Superman—who is now Clark Kent—receives information about his boss being fired and replaced by his biggest nightmare. Bruce Wayne, the famous billionaire in the whole world. Only then will they find out both of their hidden identities and seek desire from one another.

entry.title: Undisclosed Desires
entry.summary:
Author: lmaosobsquietly

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,789Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 45

Summary: Clark Kent has a habit of seeing the good in people. It’s what makes him a great reporter—and what makes Bruce Wayne a problem. Bruce doesn’t make sense. Not as a careless billionaire, not as the man Clark meets in quieter moments, and certainly not as the person Clark finds himself thinking about long after their conversations end. Bruce Wayne didn't plan on falling for a journalist with too many questions, and a smile that sees right through him. Bruce knows exactly why Clark is confused. He knows Clark is getting close to something he shouldn’t see, asking questions that don’t have safe answers. It’s a dangerous kind of attention—one Bruce should shut down immediately. Instead, he lets Clark in. Slowly. Carefully. Too much. As their connection deepens into something softer, something undeniable, the truth looms between them. AKA: First meet Bruce and Clark; their connection grows deeper as time goes along.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Proof of Detection
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 52,617Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 64

Summary: The worst has already happened - Recognition, Rejection, devastation. Now Bruce and Clark are forced to work together to solve a mystery that could alter the course of the world, while helping to build the Justice League. Can Bruce live with what he's done? Can Clark forgive the ultimate betrayal? Will the League survive the fallout if they can't?

entry.title: I Can Only Love You with Kisses and Poppies
entry.summary:
Author: notalegalist

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,195Chapters: 6/10Kudos: 60

Summary: Jason is dead, and while the grave can be filled with a casket and dirt, a hole in Bruce’s heart will remain torn open. AKA, what happens when you listen to "Funeral" by Phoebe Bridgers too many times and cry while thinking about Jason Todd and then decide it's a good idea to adapt it into a multi-chapter fic?

entry.summary:
Author: PurpleButterfly19

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,083Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 81

Summary: Superman got by magic during a fight and is now in the Watchtower’s media by recovering. But he says something very interesting upon waking up. Superman (starting intently at Batman): Wife.. Batman (looking around in confusion before pointing at himself):……? Superman (nodding and smiling in a dopey manner): Wife! Or. The time Superman called Batman in wife after recovering from being hit with magic, but it’s okay because they’d both been pinning after each other for years. Inspired brucedefender4ever on tumblr

entry.summary:
Author: scriberwrite

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,938Chapters: 3/13Kudos: 130

entry.summary:
Author: bigmouthstrikes_again

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,739Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 211

Summary: When Bruce’s silence gestured for him to go on, Clark chuckled slightly, fiddling with the sleeve of his shirt. “You know what I mean. Everyone had a grungy era of their childhood. Mine was just a little more . . . intense than others. I was more rebellious than troublesome, honestly.” Or Clark gets de-aged to seventeen a.k.a when he had his punk rock phase, and everyone is forced to bare witness

entry.title: be still, my foolish heart (don't ruin this on me)
entry.summary:
Author: mitsukiris

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,045Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 32

Summary: 'The next time Bruce moves, Clark is sure he is done for.Bruce rocks his hips as he leans down to kiss Clark’s neck. And if the feeling of Bruce’s lips on his was enough to make him burn from the inside out, the sensation of those same lips on his skin does something out of this Earth to him.And Bruce doesn’t stop at the neck.He goes down, and down, and down. Kissing, licking, biting. Making sure Clark knows who is in control. And Clark has never wanted to give up control as much in his life before. He would do anything, be anything, to be inside of Bruce.And when Bruce’s teeth graze the skin of his crotch ── his pants and underwear long forgotten on the floor ── Clark is sure his entire life is about to change.'or: After his hatred (or deep annoyance, as he'd like to call) for Bruce Wayne turns into a friendship, Clark finds himself completely lost when Bruce kisses him during the Daily Planet's New Year's Party. Nothing makes sense, not even his own sexuality. Over a month later, when they see each other again, it is Clark's turn to take Bruce by surprise. One kiss. That is all he is sure he will get out of it. That is... Until he is in Bruce's hotel room.

entry.title: Nowhere to Land
entry.summary:
Author: bloodvvitch

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 64,861Chapters: 19/25Kudos: 408

Summary: Bruce – recently injured and working a case that just won’t break – sees the tactical advantages of temporarily ‘dating’ Superman. Clark – who was almost too late to save his friend from a fatal fall – doesn’t understand what he’s signed up for. For two people who know each other so well, the World’s Finest just can’t manage to get on the same page.

entry.title: Nolan’s Dark Knight v the Man of Steel
entry.summary:
Author: legobiwan

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 81,074Chapters: 35/35Kudos: 21

Summary: Three years after the battle with Bane a tragedy accuses on the invasion of Zod which draws Bruce Wayne to return to Gotham along with Alfred and Robin (John Blake). Batman starts planning to capture Superman for his part in the Metropolis destruction, no matter how dark his methods are getting, but Lex Luthor partners with the Joker in their plan to turn The Dark Knight against The Man Of Steel.

entry.title: Fever Brain
entry.summary:
Author: skully245

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 435Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 19

Summary: Much like a college student trying to finish finals before going home for the summer, Bruce Wayne chooses to ignore the rapidly deteriorating state of his physical health to continue working. - Aka: the author was sick and decided to torture their favorite characters with it.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne
  • Clark Kent
  • Bruce Wayne
  • Alfred Pennyworth
  • Hurt/Comfort
  • Sickfic
  • Sick Character
  • No beta we die like Bruce’s sanity
